targets.query:
from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_flow_temperature" or r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_return_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_compressor_frequency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_pump_speed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Temperature Differential (Flow - Return)
panels.description: Higher differential at lower compressor frequency suggests better efficiency.

targets.query:
flow = from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_flow_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

return_ = from(bucket: "econet_grant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sensor.econet_grant_return_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {flow: flow, return_: return_}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value_flow - r._value_return_}))
